reviews.comment:
A pocos metros de la autopista 9. Rodeada de un parque muy cuidado. Ideal para relajarse y continuar.

(Translated by Google)
Just a few meters from Highway 9. Surrounded by a well-maintained park. Ideal for relaxing and continuing your journey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNncXBmSWZREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, con un espacio verde para "estirar las piernas" quienes vienen viajando. Buen servicio de cafetería. Lo único ADVERSO es que con la construcción de la AUTOPISTA ROSARIO-CORDOBA, ha quedado ubicada a unos kms, de la misma, lo que implica saicar lir de la misma, tomar la vieja Ruta 9 y regresar, lo que demora algunos minutos. El ACA estará pensando en reubicarla sobre la AUTOPISTA? Sería bueno....

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, with a green space for travelers to stretch their legs. Good cafeteria service. The only downside is that with the construction of the Rosario-Córdoba Highway, it's now located a few kilometers away, which means leaving the highway, taking the old Route 9, and returning, which takes a few minutes. Is the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) considering relocating it to the highway? That would be great.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRaktIdmdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Desde que soy chico me llevaban de vacaciones a cordoba y siempre parabamos a hacer noche ahi. Lindos recuerdos y hermoso lugar y entorno con la naturaleza. Hoy siguo pasando cada vez que voy o vengo de bs as es la parada obligatoria. Ahora lo hago con mi novia!!!

(Translated by Google)
Ever since I was a kid, they'd take me on vacation to Córdoba, and we'd always stop there for the night. Wonderful memories, a beautiful place, and stunning natural surroundings. I still make a point of stopping there every time I go to or from Buenos Aires. Now I go with my girlfriend!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBX2RLQ3dRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Recomiendo esta estación de servicio!! Los empleados siempre tienen la mejor predisposición, y el parque con la cancha y los juegos son un gran placer en medio de un viaje (sobre todo con chicos!)

(Translated by Google)
I highly recommend this gas station! The staff are always very helpful, and the park with the sports field and games is a great treat during a trip (especially with kids!).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBajR1MkNBEAE
